enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder while feeling depressed, covering frustrations with a faulty 128GB microSD card he's trying to use for audiobooks, a neuropsychological evaluation he took that day (testing for Asperger's at his mom's request), movies watched with his roommate (Everest and Agent 47), and a response to an article about the effects of daily cannabis use on short-term memory — noting he's been a daily user since around 2013-2014 and will serve as his own long-term test case. He also briefly shows progress on a Google Earth mapping project.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Accepts that short-term memory for names may decline slightly but notes test subjects were likely still under the influence, and volunteers himself as a long-term public test case
Wants to do it someday but is deterred by the sheer cliff sections near the Hillary Step
128GB is significantly more useful because it can hold nearly all audiobooks he wants
